lead: We collaborate with select landlords and developers to create distinctive retail destinations by bringing together targeted, best-in-class tenants.

sections.heading: Global Reach
sections.body: Having completed thousands of transactions across the United States, Canada, and Europe, our team has built strong relationships with major landlords, developers, and retailers worldwide — and a deep understanding of the specific elements that drive success, or failure, in real estate projects throughout the world.

sections.heading: Placemaking
sections.body: Skilled placemakers, we curate compelling merchandising plans with a unique, market-relevant leasing vision — bringing together targeted, best-in-class tenants in transformational and innovative retail environments.

sections.heading: Reporting
sections.body: Dedicated project managers ensure maximum transparency. Using industry-leading software, they keep our clients' finger on the pulse with accurate, on-demand reporting and timely, consistent communication, customized to each project.

featuredWork.title: Sportsmen's Lodge
featuredWork.summary: 95,000 SF country-mart-inspired project transforming the iconic Sportsmen's Lodge events space into a health, wellness, beauty, dining, and shopping destination in L.A.'s San Fernando Valley.
featuredWork.scope: Project Leasing, Marketing Materials, Vision & Design Consulting, Merchandise Planning
featuredWork.achievement: Fully leased with best-in-class tenant roster
featuredWork.selectTenants: Equinox, Erewhon, ALO, Vuori, Reformation, The Great, Wittmore, COS Bar, Salt Optics, FP Movement, Madewell, Hoka, Kismet Rotisserie, Sugarfish, Roberta's Pizza, Hi-Ho Cheeseburger, Uovo, Madison Reed Color Bar, Myodetox, Tocaya, Civil Coffee, Winston Pies, Van Leeuwen

featuredWork.title: 2nd & PCH
featuredWork.summary: 225,000 SF seaside shopping, dining, and lifestyle destination on an 11-acre parcel at the gateway between Los Angeles and Orange counties, anchored by Whole Foods.
featuredWork.scope: Project Leasing, Vision-Creation, Merchandise Planning, Site Plan & Design Consulting, Marketing & Branding
featuredWork.selectTenants: Whole Foods, Bungalow Kitchen, Urban Outfitters, Nike Live, Anthropologie, Free People, Lululemon, Madewell, Sephora, Amazon, Warby Parker, Gorjana, Peloton, Athleta, Ola Mexican, Shake Shack, Urban Plates, Noble Bird, Hungry Angelina, Tocaya

featuredWork.title: Fourth Street Berkeley
featuredWork.summary: 22,500 SF development (part of larger 60,000 SF Jamestown project) along Fourth and Hearst Streets creating a compelling merchandise mix of national, regional, and local merchants.
featuredWork.scope: Strategic Planning, Merchandise Planning, Market Analysis, Leasing, Marketing
featuredWork.achievement: Curated mix of national and local merchants in a walkable street district
featuredWork.selectTenants: Lululemon, Warby Parker, Marine Layer, Cafe Reveille, Soul Cycle, Madewell, Marlowe, Saje, Stella Carakasi

featuredWork.title: District La Brea
featuredWork.summary: 110,214 SF adaptive re-use of eleven 1930s-era buildings on La Brea Avenue, transformed into a creative retail and dining destination dubbed "The Menswear Miracle Mile" by GQ Magazine.
featuredWork.scope: Merchandising Strategy, Vision-Creation, Re-Branding, Market Analysis, Marketing, Leasing
featuredWork.achievement: Dubbed "The Menswear Miracle Mile" by GQ. Rents increased 60% in three years.
featuredWork.selectTenants: Aether, Stone Island, Garrett Leight, Sugarfish, Bonobos, Undefeated, Gant, Steven Alan, Kelly Cole, Dr. Collector's, A+R, Odys & Penelope, Troika, Judith Bright

featuredWork.title: Brookfield Place
featuredWork.summary: $300M redevelopment and repositioning of the iconic World Financial Center, transforming outdated lower levels of four office towers into 375,000 SF of world-class shopping, dining, lifestyle amenities, and community activation.
featuredWork.scope: Strategic Planning, Market Analysis, Design, Vision-Creation, Re-Branding, Marketing, PR, Merchandise Planning, Leasing
featuredWork.achievement: $300M repositioning; world-class luxury and dining destination
featuredWork.selectTenants: Saks 5th Avenue, Equinox, Hermes, Gucci, Bottega Veneta, Salvatore Ferragamo, Burberry, Omega, Tory Burch, Vince, Theory, DVF, Michael Kors, Paul Smith, Lululemon, Bonobos, J. Crew, Le District, L'Atelier by Joel Robuchon, Parm, Blue Ribbon Sushi, Tartinery

featuredWork.title: South Bay Social District
featuredWork.summary: $500M adaptive reuse transforming the existing South Bay Galleria into a social district and downtown for the region, pioneering a "de-mall" approach to create a naturally-ventilated, stunning, innovative space.
featuredWork.achievement: $500M pioneering de-mall transformation backed by LVMH/Arnault family

quote.quote: Having this global presence helps me when I'm looking globally, but it also gives me a more worldly sort of wisdom and advice when I'm looking in the United States.
quote.name: Stephen Starr

intelTeaser: Tenant pipelines, merchandising mix, market briefs. The intelligence behind every leasing plan.
